screen.timerins_addons.config.title: Timerin's Addons
screen.timerins_addons.config.collection: Currently DEV-KEY in COLLECTIONS until Personal key. Collection totals use the latest profile sync plus a live estimate from inventory pickups (and sack item NBT when the server exposes counts). Deltas reset when the profile total changes.
screen.timerins_addons.collections_hud_f: Currently DEV-KEY in COLLECTIONS until Personal key
screen.timerins_addons.help.title: /timerin command help
screen.timerins_addons.help.body:
Always choose item tracker vs collection. The id and target are one greedy tail (space before the final number) so ids with : or ; work:
  /timerin add item <item_spec>
  /timerin add collection <collection_spec>

Collections need a Hypixel API key in config. Profile keys match api.hypixel.net (raw_fish:1 vs RAW_FISH-1 both work).

Remove:
  /timerin remove item <id fragment>
  /timerin remove collection <resource id fragment>

Clear:
  /timerin clear  (same as clear all)
  /timerin clear all | item | collection

Config:
  /timerin config
message.timerins_addons.collection_comma: Usage: /timerin add collection <resource id …> <target> (space before the number).
message.timerins_addons.add_item_parse_f: Usage: /timerin add item <item id …> <target> (space before the number).
screen.timerins_addons.add_target.title: Track item
option.timerins_addons.hud_scale.tooltip: Scales the tracker panel (icons + text). This is separate from Minecraft's Options → GUI Scale — changing GUI Scale should barely change the tracker size. With chat or a container open, scroll vertically over the panel to adjust scale (horizontal scroll is ignored).
option.timerins_addons.default_target.to: Starting goal amount for a new empty row in the list below.
option.timerins_addons.collection_hud_en: Second panel with the same scaling as the item tracker; drag positions separately (stored in collections.json).
option.timerins_addons.hypixel_api_key.t: From developer.hypixel.net. Stored only in collections.json. Used for SkyBlock profile collection totals; automatic refresh at most once every 5 seconds when this HUD is enabled.
option.timerins_addons.collection_resour: Hypixel profile collection key (e.g. COBBLESTONE). Must match api.hypixel.net skyblock profile data.
option.timerins_addons.collection_item_k: Used to match item stacks for the live pickup estimate (and inventory-only mode without an API key). Should match the SkyBlock item id for that resource (e.g. cobblestone vs enchanted variants).
option.timerins_addons.collection_sack_a: Optional extra names when Hypixel text still does not match. The mod also bundles a NotEnoughUpdates-REPO display→item-id map (see scripts/build_neu_display_index.py). Example override: Raw Cod if an item is missing from that map.
message.timerins_addons.command.cleared_: Cleared item tracker and collection goals (local estimates reset).
message.timerins_addons.no_key: Could not resolve an item id for that stack.
message.timerins_addons.collection_need_: Currently DEV-KEY in COLLECTIONS until Personal key
message.timerins_addons.collection_fetch: Could not load SkyBlock profile right now.
